ValidationRule.description: Prevents User from entering a past date on the Requested Ship Date
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND(SBQQ__Quote__r.NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c = "NATT_Units_Quote", NATT_Requested_Ship_Date__c < TODAY(), OR(ISNEW(),ISCHANGED(NATT_Requested_Ship_Date__c), ISNULL(PRIORVALUE(NATT_Requested_Ship_Date__c))), ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, "Quote")),
AND(ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, "Amendment"), NATT_Requested_Ship_Date__c < TODAY(), ISCHANGED(NATT_Requested_Ship_Date__c), NOT(ISNEW()), SBQQ__Quote__r.NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c = 'NATT_Units_Quote_Amendment' ) )
